data.content: Shipment complete. Merged branch `codex/2475-beat-state-overview` to `main` by fast-forward and pushed remote `main` to commit fd6b433688e15fad445879131119474ec62b05c8. Verified `origin/main` and local `HEAD` match that commit. GitHub Actions passed for the pushed main commit: CI run 25306895225 succeeded, Coverage Badge run 25306895228 succeeded. CI emitted coverage-regression annotations but the workflow completed successfully. Post-merge git hook reported active Knots leases during sync, but the Git merge and remote push succeeded and remote main is at the shipped commit.
